# ANCHORS_MS33 LE_PER_DD variant PRJ + identical-parameter native/MFront comparison tables

Snapshot bundle consolidated 2026-06-10 from two small untracked leftovers
under `Tests/Data/RichardsMechanics/`, bundled together per instruction.
Everything below is distilled from the files' own headers/contents; numbers
quoted, not recomputed.

## Contents

### 1. `ANCHORS_MS33_LE_PER_DD/ModelIV/ms33_modelIV_pellets_le_perdd_TMP.prj`

A comparison-variant PRJ (variant `LE_PER_DD`, i.e. LE with per-dry-density
treatment) auto-generated by `gen_ms33_variants.py` from the original
`ANCHORS_MS33_ModelIV/ms33_modelIV_pellets.prj` in worktree
`dsm_native_hierarchical_wt` (per its own header comment). It is the EURAD-2
MS33 Model IV clay-pellets homogenisation case (axisymmetric 50 mm dia x
70 mm: bentonite block ρ_d=1600 kg/m³, φ0=0.424460, K=29999.2513 J/kg;
pellets ρ_d=900 kg/m³, φ0=0.676259, K≈150 J/kg "Villar target at 0.9 g/cm³ ≈
0.051 MPa; K extrapolated from calibration curve"; pellet k0 from
Kozeny-Carman, k_ref=5.6e-21 m² at φ_ref=0.42 — all quoted from the PRJ
header). Mesh paths point at `../../ANCHORS_MS33_ModelIV/*.vtu` (the tracked
benchmark meshes — not duplicated here). `_TMP` suffix and the absence of any
output suggest a scratch/generated file; whether it was ever run is **not
recorded**.

Caveat (cross-reference, not from this folder): the 0.051 MPa pellet target is
the Villar-Eq.7 reading that the 2026-06-08 `ms33_pdisj_aug_tuller` campaign
later corrected to the Dixon-basis 0.350 MPa (see bundle
`2026-06-08T0803_dsm_native_pdisj_aug_tuller_ms33_le_mcc_interteam`,
RUN_REPORT.md §6). This PRJ predates that correction.

### 2. `_outputs/identical_parameter_native_mfront_comparison_with_epfl/`

Summary tables (CSV + JSON, no VTUs) of an identical-parameter native-vs-MFront
comparison sweep, mode `identical_parameter_shared_multiplier_curve`, shared
curve `ANCHORS_MS33_ModelI/villar_dense_dd_calibration.csv`, 40 rows / 20
pairwise deltas across benchmark groups ANCHORS_MS33_ModelI (dd1400…dd1800),
beacon, and EPFL stress-path cases. Headline delta stats quoted from the JSON:

- anchors: max |Δ| = 1.663 MPa (case dd1475), max rel Δ = 0.837 (dd1450)
- epfl: max |Δ| = 0.979 MPa, max rel Δ = 0.822 (both p2_1_abprime)
- beacon: NaN (case 1a01)

Note the large native-vs-MFront discrepancies in these tables (e.g. dd1400:
mfront 1.146 MPa vs native 0.224 MPa final swelling pressure under the same
multiplier) — recorded as-is from the files; no interpretation is recorded in
the source folder.

## Omissions

None — both source folders were copied in full (4 files, ~96 KB). The
referenced inputs (`ANCHORS_MS33_ModelIV` meshes, the shared calibration CSV)
are tracked repo assets and not duplicated.
